pi_items.source: iDempiere v12 GardenWorld demo data confirmed in /env_creation_notes/specific_env_notes/idempiere_env/notes.md. Seed Farm Inc. is listed as a standard vendor (isvendor='Y') in the default GardenWorld database.
iDempiere v12 GardenWorld demo data confirmed in /env_creation_notes/specific_env_notes/idempiere_env/notes.md. Oak Tree is listed as a standard product in the default GardenWorld database.

Quantity of 100 units is a reasonable and typical value for procurement scenarios in ERP systems. The export_result.sh queries for iol.movementqty = 100, but no authoritative source confirming this is the standard or correct value was found.

Freight amount of $250.00 is a reasonable and typical value for landed cost scenarios in ERP systems. The export_result.sh queries for i.grandtotal = 250.00, but no authoritative source confirming this is the standard or correct value was found.

Verified through multiple iDempiere wiki pages and search results. According to the iDempiere Landed Cost documentation, 'Freight' is a standard charge type used in landed cost allocation. The task description explicitly mentions 'Charge type Freight (or Landed Cost)' as valid options. Web searches confirmed Freight is one of the documented examples of landed cost charges (freight, excise tax, insurance).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real, publicly available iDempiere GardenWorld demo data (not synthetic). Verified facts: Seed Farm Inc. is a standard vendor in the GardenWorld database; Oak Tree is a standard product in GardenWorld; Freight is a valid charge type for landed cost allocation in iDempiere. The receipt quantity of 100 units and freight amount of $250.00 are reasonable values for an ERP procurement scenario but lack direct verification from authoritative sources.
